basic_details.job_title: DGFT Chennai Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Directorate General of Foreign Trade (DGFT) Young Professional Notification 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website dgft.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DGFT Young Professional Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in Economics, MBA, B.Tech/BE (Mechanical/Chemical/IT/Computer Science), MCA, Masters in Commerce, Masters in Law
qualification.details: Masters in Economics from a recognized university Masters in Business Administration (MBA) from a recognized university B. Tech/BE (Mechanical) from a recognized university B. Tech/BE (Chemical) from a recognized university B. Tech/BE (IT/Computer Science) from a recognized university MCA from a recognized university Masters in Commerce from a recognized university Masters in Law from a recognized university

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DGFT Chennai Young Professional Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Young Professional post at DGFT Chennai?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Young Professional post at DGFT Chennai is 23 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Masters degree in Economics, MBA, B.Tech/BE in Mechanical, Chemical, IT/Computer Science, MCA, Masters in Commerce, or Masters in Law from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Young Professional post is 30 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 60,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the DGFT Chennai Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their complete application via email to the designated email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Young Professional role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Young Professional post will be based on merit.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Young Professional is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the DGFT Chennai office located?
faq.answer: DGFT Chennai is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with a pincode of 600006.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from other states apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any state-wise restrictions, so candidates from other states may be eligible if they meet the qualifications and age criteria.
